scheme_name: Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-Law of Freedom Fighters
page_title: Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-Law of Freedom Fighters

details: The "Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-Law of Freedom Fighters" scheme is implemented by the Police Department under the Department of Home, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free travel facilities in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation buses to the widowed daughters-in-law of freedom fighters.
benefits: Under this scheme, widowed daughters-in-law of freedom fighters are entitled to free travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation (UTC) buses across the state.
eligibility: The applicant must be a widowed daughter-in-law of a freedom fighter from Uttarakhand.
The beneficiary must possess a valid identity card for the journey.

offline: To obtain an identity card, the widowed daughter-in-law of a freedom fighter must contact the concerned District Magistrate's office, inquire about the required documents, and submit the application.
The District Magistrate's office will then issue her an identity card, on the basis of which she can travel free of cost in the buses of the Uttarakhand Transport Corporation.

documents_required: Identity proof (Aadhaar card, voter ID, etc.)

faqs.question: Who are eligible beneficiaries?
faqs.answer: Widowed daughters-in-law of freedom fighters are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: To offer free travel facilities across all UTC bus services within Uttarakhand to eligible beneficiaries.

faqs.question: Is there any cost to avail this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the travel is completely free for eligible beneficiaries.

faqs.question: How can one obtain the identity card?
faqs.answer: The applicant must contact the concerned District Magistrate’s office, submit the required documents, and the office will issue the identity card.

faqs.question: Is the free travel valid for all types of UTC buses?
faqs.answer: Yes, the free travel facility is applicable on all UTC bus services within the state.
